details: The agent found only 8 labels by sampling 100 open and 100 closed issues, but the known fact is that openclaw/openclaw has approximately 124 labels. The agent acknowledged its approach was incomplete ('There may be additional labels defined in the repository that haven't been applied to any of the sampled issues') but still reported 8 as the total count. The agent failed to find a proper way to enumerate all repository labels and produced a significantly incorrect count (8 vs ~124).
